title: Support dynamic array .size in inline randomize() with constraints (#7258)

features.name: dynamic array size method in inline randomize constraint
features.description: Code should include a dynamic array with .size() method call inside an inline randomize() with {} constraint
features.snippet:
class C; rand byte a[]; endclass
C c; c.randomize() with { a.size() > 0; };

features.name: queue size method in inline randomize constraint
features.description: Code should include a queue with .size() method call inside an inline randomize() with {} constraint
features.snippet:
class C; rand int q[$]; endclass
C c; c.randomize() with { q.size() > 0; };

features.name: cross-field dynamic array size binding in inline constraint
features.description: Code should include a dynamic array .size() compared equal to another field variable inside an inline randomize() with {} constraint
features.snippet:
class C; rand int len; rand byte data[]; endclass
C c; c.randomize() with { data.size() == len; };

features.name: multiple dynamic arrays with size constraints in inline randomize
features.description: Code should include multiple dynamic arrays with .size() constraints in the same inline randomize() with {} constraint block
features.snippet:
class C; rand byte a[]; rand byte b[]; endclass
C c; c.randomize() with { a.size() == 10; b.size() == a.size(); };
